def negative_assert_used_for_runtime_input_validation_in_production():
    rule_id = "assert_used_for_runtime_input_validation_in_production"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "assert statement used to validate user-provided input or production logic, which is stripped by -O."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
